Static evidence board

Verified dashboard fixture

Category A has the larger value: 2 compared with 1 for category B.

Headline value

3

Total count across two fixture rows.

Largest category

A

Category A contributes two of the three total units.

Category comparison

Question: How do the two fixture categories compare? Unit: count.

Takeaway: Category A is twice category B.

Exact values

All two fixture rows; no rows are omitted.
Category Value (count)
A 2
B 1

Method and disclosures

No aggregation, sampling, projection, exclusion, or geographic inference was applied.

Source verification and lineage

Source: fixture.csv. The fixture digest and verified status are recorded in the manifest.
